_comment: ComfyUI API-format txt2img graph for an SD/SDXL checkpoint. This is the exact node graph ComfyUI's 'Save (API Format)' emits — the contract the operator's local ComfyUI server expects. Replace every <<token>>; numeric tokens (width/height/batch/seed/steps/cfg) MUST become real JSON numbers, not strings. Flux uses a different node set — add a separate template if a Flux model is configured.
